decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the closest canonical match: same entity_name ('New York City Transit' vs 'MTA New York City Transit'), same entity_type ('agency'), same acronym ('NYCT'). The registry record already captures this entity. Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is the closest canonical match: same entity_name ('New York City Department of Transportation'), same entity_type ('agency'), same acronym ('NYC DOT' / 'DOT'). The registry record already captures this entity. Closest match IS own base_record_id → new.

Observation base_record_id entity_first-second-ave-sbs-cac is the closest canonical match: same entity_name ('First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS Community Advisory Committee'), same entity_type ('committee'), identical description about composition and role. The registry record already captures this entity. Closest match IS own base_record_id → new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: About the First Ave/Second Ave CAC
